args.subject: Fernwood Ltd: data export manifest prepared
args.body: The export manifest for Fernwood Ltd has been prepared, covering crm_contacts, invoices, usage_events, and support_threads. No active legal hold applies.

args.subject: Your Halcyon access has now ended
args.body: Your organisation's access to Halcyon has now been revoked, following the end of your contract.

args.subject: Your pro-rata Halcyon refund
args.body: A pro-rata refund of 240.00 has been issued to order ORD-3320 for the unused portion of your Halcyon subscription.

args.text: Refund of 240.00 issued against ORD-3320 and customer notified at accounts@fernwood.example.

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd: deletion schedule confirmed
args.body: Deletion schedule for Fernwood Ltd's exported data is confirmed: all exported datasets will be deleted on 2026-08-16 (30 days post-export).

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd offboarding complete
args.body: Fernwood Ltd's offboarding is complete: export prepared, access revoked, pro-rata refund issued, and deletion scheduled for 2026-08-16.
